name: Fitness: Lifestyle
short_description: Fitness: Lifestyle is a simulation game focused on physical transformation and personal improvement. Train your character's body, work out, fight in the arena and achieve a toned body.
detailed_description:
Get ready to face the challenge of Fitness: Lifestyle, the definitive simulator for those who dream of transforming their physique and surpassing limits! Here, you take on the role of an ordinary person who decides to change their life and achieve a toned body with training, dedication and focus.

  • Enter the gym, train your character's body. Your character will begin to gradually change as you train.

  • Work and you will earn money to buy clothes and other items.

  • Bet on yourself and fight in the arena against underground fighters.

    In Fitness: Lifestyle, sweat and dedication are rewarded. Jump into the journey, overcome laziness, break your limits and show what you are capable of. Are you ready to take on this challenge?
